description: Plan an efficient geocaching route within a 240-minute budget. Include cache prioritization, distance calculations, and time estimates. Save the plan to /home/ga/Documents/geocaching_route.txt.

natural_language.prompt: You have 240 minutes to find geocaches in Rocky Mountain National Park. Calculate estimated time and distance for each cache, prioritize which ones to visit (all Priority 1 caches are mandatory), and ensure your total time doesn't exceed 240 minutes.
